content: في شَكوى مِن الجيران هِنا بِتقول إنّ صوت كوا عالي أوي
translations: eng:there are complaints from the neighbours, they say that your volume is too loud

transcriptions.arabizi: fi shakwa min ilgeeraan hina bit'ool 'innasoot|ku Aaeli 'awi
